children.name: Calvadosia
children.description: Calvadosia — a genus of kishinouyeid stalked jellyfish in the family Kishinouyeidae.

children.name: Calvadosia campanulata
children.description: Calvadosia campanulata — a species in the genus Calvadosia, family Kishinouyeidae. Also known as kishinouyeid stalked jellyfish.

children.name: Calvadosia capensis
children.description: Calvadosia capensis — a species in the genus Calvadosia, family Kishinouyeidae. Also known as kishinouyeid stalked jellyfish.

children.name: Calvadosia corbini
children.description: Calvadosia corbini is a stalked jellyfish species in the family Kishinouyeidae from the tropical western Atlantic..

children.name: Calvadosia cruciformis
children.description: Calvadosia cruciformis — a species in the genus Calvadosia, family Kishinouyeidae. Also known as kishinouyeid stalked jellyfish.

children.name: Calvadosia cruxmelitensis
children.description: Calvadosia cruxmelitensis is a stalked jellyfish which inhabits the intertidal and sublittoral zones of rocky coasts in south-western England and the Atlantic coast of Ireland..

children.name: Calvadosia hawaiiensis
children.description: Calvadosia hawaiiensis — a species in the genus Calvadosia, family Kishinouyeidae. Also known as kishinouyeid stalked jellyfish.
